_provenance: comp-020 brief-scrubbed verification re-run; target list constructed independently from CLAUDE.md mission specification; no prior comp-018/019 outputs consulted.
_design_note: Independent verification re-run. The author was given target nodes and compound-class scope; no prior compound names. All findings emerge from the lit-scan.

C1q.role: Classical pathway initiation; binds IgG/IgM Fc, charged surfaces, dying cells
C1q.gout_relevance: MSU crystals coated with IgG/IgM activate classical pathway via C1q (Russell 1982 PMID 6749358; Doherty 1988 PMID 2833185)

MBL_collectins_ficolins.role: Lectin pathway initiation; binds carbohydrate patterns
MBL_collectins_ficolins.gout_relevance: MBL deposits on MSU; lectin-pathway contribution to gout flare priming

C3_alternative_tickover.role: Spontaneous C3 hydrolysis seeds alternative pathway amplification loop
C3_alternative_tickover.gout_relevance: Amplification on MSU surface drives convertase formation

C5_convertase.gout_relevance: Generates C5a (dominant NLRP3 priming signal in gout)

Factor_D.role: Cleaves Factor B; rate-limiting AP enzyme; iptacopan adjacent

Factor_H.role: AP regulator; UPREGULATING is positive intervention

C5aR1_C5L2.role: C5a receptors; C5aR1 = pro-inflammatory; C5L2 = decoy/modulator

ruled_out_do_not_redo: Direct natural-product C5aR1 antagonist class (comp-014 + validation-experiments §1.21 - empty)
Avacopan (synthetic C5aR1 antagonist; FDA-approved; not fermentable; in corpus already)
DAF/CD55 SCR1-4 protein engineering thread (comp-012, H05)
